prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of NFLX, the stock typically exhibits an annualized volatility of approximately 35-40%. Confidence intervals are constructed using log-normal distribution assumptions, with wider intervals reflecting the inherent uncertainty in stock price movements over the 22-day period.
